title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs
description: Zero-knowledge proofs let someone prove a statement is true without revealing the underlying witness. They matter as background for privacy systems, validity proofs, and off-chain verification schemes discussed around Bitcoin.

resources.title: Zcash Learn: What are zero-knowledge proofs?
resources.notes: Clear introduction to the core prove-without-revealing idea.

resources.title: Zcash Learn: What are zk-SNARKs?
resources.notes: Bridges the generic zero-knowledge concept to practical proof systems.

resources.title: STARK paper
resources.notes: Primary-source paper for scalable transparent proof systems.
